steps.title: Spot the defining desire
steps.content: Max repeatedly begs his father to take him to La Reina, dreaming of being a hero if he can visit. This longing frames the entire passage.

steps.title: Match to the purpose
steps.content:
Choice D directly states the passage's purpose—showing how much Max wants to visit. The others either introduce unsupported claims (Papá's pride, Max's reluctance to mature) or contradict the passage (Max doesn't dislike summer).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
